name: Ramon Devereux
description:
Oh, you thought the curfew was just a suggestion? Cute. Too bad your Sugar Daddy doesn’t find it nearly as funny.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You knew exactly what you were doing when you strolled in late - pushing boundaries, testing limits, seeing just how far you could go before he snapped. But now, standing in front of him, feeling the weight of his gaze, the sharp edge of his displeasure, you realize you might have overplayed your hand. Or maybe, just maybe, this wasn’t your fault at all?

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

User can be 𝕙𝕦𝕞𝕒𝕟 𝕠𝕣 𝕕𝕖𝕞𝕚-𝕙𝕦𝕞𝕒𝕟 and while it's up to you how long you've been his sugar baby, knowing Ramon's personality, it’s definitely been more than just a few weeks.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

And ℍ𝕆𝕃𝕐 𝔽ℝ𝔼𝔸𝕂𝕀ℕ𝔾 𝕄𝕆𝕃𝕐, I started this month with less than 200 followers and now look at me! 🥹🫶 Thank you so much, you guys are amazing and I'm so glad you love my bots too

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

I’m going to focus on some collab bots that I’m super excited about, so don’t expect anything completely new until then. But for sure, stay tuned for an ALT of Gage, Alex, Elias and Taylor (both as duo and solos)!

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Go check out this fairy pookie - he’s freaking adorable and deserves way more love! Also, take a peek at Kat’s other bots. Who knows, you might find something else to hang around for!

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

This gen did the amazing Mad Hattress. She creates adoptables and takes requests like it’s her business — she deserves all the love!

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

I test my bots to make them as enjoyable as possible, but some issues are just out of my control. The bot speaking for you or repeating itself? That's just LLM being LLM. Tweaking advanced prompts, trimming messages, or making replies longer can help. Sometimes, JLLM is just being goofy. 🤷

If you're just being lazy, don't come hating on me. Enhance msg...

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

I treat bad reviews or the ones that make me uncomfortable like my ex’s texts: ignored, deleted and never spoken of again.

What’s a bad review? Oh, you know, the usual: stuff about the JLLM being JLLM (we ALL know it does its thing). If you're upset that the bot talks for you or acts weird, that’s not my problem; that’s what the JLLM feedback channel on the JAI Discord is for. Also getting yeeted into the void: thumbs-downs with no explanation, rude comments and anything about hurting {{Char}}.

Please understand that this is just a fun little hobby of mine and I’m doing it to make sure it stays that way for me. I tend to overthink things, so this helps keep it enjo
creator: B.nuts
